mapper.sql: id, teacher_no, name, gender, title, major_id, major_name, college, phone, email, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, m.major_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN major m ON t.major_id = m.id ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
SELECT t.*, m.major_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN major m ON t.major_id = m.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
SELECT t.*, m.major_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN major m ON t.major_id = m.id WHERE t.teacher_no = #{teacherNo}
SELECT t.*, m.major_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN major m ON t.major_id = m.id WHERE t.major_id = #{majorId} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (teacher_no, name, gender, title, major_id, major_name, college, phone, email, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{teacherNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{title}, #{majorId}, #{majorName}, #{college}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE teacher SET teacher_no = #{teacherNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, title = #{title}, major_id = #{majorId}, major_name = #{majorName}, college = #{college}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher WHERE teacher_no = #{teacherNo}
